rationale: Section 11.42 governs the qualification date and effective timing of exemptions, not exemption dollar amounts. Increasing the §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount does not conflict with any operative provision of §11.42.
quote: eligibility for and amount of an exemption authorized by this chapter for any tax year are determined by a claimant's qualifications on January 1.
_note: No conflict. §11.42 addresses timing/qualification, not dollar thresholds; the proposed amount change to §11.13(b) requires no conforming amendment to §11.42.
